My Photo

My Password

My Recent Actions

Admin Accounts

0 / 3 admins

Only the main admin can add the two other admins, remove them, reset their passwords, and view their activity.

Role Responsibilities

Role Responsibilities
Chairlady / Vice Chairladies Welfare requests, member support, and oversight reports.
Secretary / Vice Secretary Member records, announcements, and reports.
Treasurer / Vice Treasurer Dues, donations, payment confirmation, and financial reports.
Media Gallery, videos, contact messages, and publicity tools.
Organizer Events, daily/weekly/monthly activities, and volunteer coordination.
Amir Da'awah / Director of Da'awah Prayer times, Hadiths, Islamic resources, lectures, and reminders.

Role Permission Editor

Main admin can adjust role permissions used by the browser app. Keep admin/executive roles broad and officer roles focused.

Pending Role Requests

Officer accounts stay inactive until the main admin approves them. Each role can have only one active holder, and approval unlocks only that role's tools.

Assign Member Role

Choose a registered member and assign their office role from the admin panel.

Reset Member Password

Send a Firebase password reset email to the member's registered email address.

Add Admin

First admin self-registration is locked after the main admin exists. Use this form to add any other admin account.

Current Admins

Database Backup & Restore

Download a private Firestore JSON backup before hosting changes, upgrades, or large edits. Restore is locked unless the server enables it.

Admin Activity
